compiled_state.title: CLAUDE.md: sprint reference updates for primary ticket model
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Edit CLAUDE.md to update sprint references for the primary ticket model (SC5).

## PRE-CONDITION (SAFEGUARD FILE)
CLAUDE.md is a safeguard file per Critical Rule 18. The sub-agent MUST present the specific changes to the user and receive explicit approval before writing. If running in non-interactive mode, defer as INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED.

## Changes
1. Phase Overview table: "Select epic" -> "Select primary ticket" in Phase 1 row
2. Error situations: "Epic has 0 children" -> "Primary ticket has 0 children"
3. Sprint section references: update "epic" -> "primary ticket" where referring to sprint target
4. Keep "epic" when referring to the ticket type specifically (not the sprint target)

## TDD Exemption
Exempt — static documentation asset with mechanical terminology updates (unit exemption criterion #3: only static assets where no executable assertion is possible).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md contains "Select primary ticket" or "Primary Ticket Selection"
  Verify: grep -q "primary ticket\|Primary Ticket" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] User approval documented in commit message
  Verify: echo "Manual check: user approval required before commit"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
